scripts.dev-dby: cross-env VITE_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:8080 VITE_PROXY_PREFIX=/api VITE_PROXY_REWRITE_TO=/api RAGFLOW_BASE_URL=http://172.16.1.66/v1 AI_MID=http://172.16.1.67:5000 vite
scripts.test: cross-env VITE_PROXY_TARGET=https://cm.aizzyun.com VITE_PROXY_PREFIX=/api VITE_PROXY_REWRITE_TO=/aidoc/api vite --mode test
scripts.build:prod-dby: vue-tsc -b && cross-env RAGFLOW_BASE_URL=http://172.16.1.66/v1 AI_MID=http://172.16.1.67:5000 AI_APP=http://172.16.1.67:4999/aidoc vite build --mode prod
